channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Build programmatic agents with the Cursor SDK
item.description: Launch, steer, and compose custom agents with the Cursor SDK.

item.title: Continually improving our agent harness
item.description: Models need a harness to become fully useful, and improving that harness means continuously iterating on context, evaluation, and model-specific tuning.

item.title: Bootstrapping Composer with autoinstall
item.description: How Composer autoinstall bootstraps runnable RL environments by using earlier model versions to automate setup and verification.

item.title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what
item.description: PayPal is positioned to increase roadmap throughput by 40% with Cursor in 2026. High-adoption teams are now deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 5x faster.

item.title: Updates to Bugbot for Teams and Individuals
item.description: Bugbot is switching from seat-based subscriptions to usage-based billing for Individual and Teams plans.
